Home > LLM > Google Gemini

Google Gemini

★★★★☆ Free tier with limits Paid from: $19.99/month

Visit official site →

Google's AI assistant with Search integration. Free tier introduced weekly percentage caps in May 2026. Paid from $19.99/month.

Google Gemini Free Credits Details

  • Amount: Free tier with limits
  • Reset: Weekly reset (percentage cap)
  • Watermark: N/A
  • Commercial: Paid only

Google Gemini Key Features

  • AI Chat
  • Google Search Integration
  • Image Understanding
  • Veo Video Generation (Paid)
  • Gmail/Docs Integration

Pros

  • Google Search integration for latest info
  • Strong multimodal capabilities
  • Deep Google ecosystem integration
  • API free tier ~1000 calls/day

Cons

  • Free tier heavily rate-limited
  • Basically unusable during peak hours
  • Pro model hard to access for free users
  • Paid tiers are expensive

Tips

  • Use Google AI Studio API instead of App to bypass limits
  • Avoid Pacific time peak hours
  • Use Flash model for simple tasks to save Pro quota
